title.purpose: Wordmark and modal titles; no display tier.

data.purpose: Every numeral incl. map marginalia — mono tabular.

shadows.name: device-ambient
shadows.purpose: Only under the 3D-preview device bezel (The Bench Step Rule: everything else is flat).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one orange action per region — Generate, Apply.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 14px; border:1px solid #FF4D1C; border-radius:2px; background:#FF4D1C; color:#000; font:600 13px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#FF6A3D; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:1px solid rgba(255,77,28,0.6); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Standard Button
components.description: Raised faceplate control for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 14px; border:1px solid rgba(168,121,74,0.55); border-radius:2px; background:#2E2A22; color:#ECE7DE; font:500 13px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn:hover { background:#37322A; border-color:rgba(168,121,74,0.7); } .ds-btn:active { transform:translateY(1px); }

components.name: Rocker Switch
components.css: .ds-switch { appearance:none; -webkit-appearance:none; width:28px; height:15px; border:1px solid rgba(168,121,74,0.55); border-radius:2px; background:radial-gradient(circle closest-side,#9A9285 0 92%,transparent 96%) left 3px center/9px 9px no-repeat,#191714; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 120ms; } .ds-switch:checked { background:radial-gradient(circle closest-side,#FF4D1C 0 92%,transparent 96%) right 3px center/9px 9px no-repeat,#2A2017; border-color:rgba(255,77,28,0.5); }

components.name: Ruler Slider
components.description: Fader on a sepia tick track with an orange thumb.
components.html: <input class="ds-slider" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="40" style="width:200px">
components.css: .ds-slider { appearance:none; -webkit-appearance:none; height:16px; background:transparent; cursor:pointer; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height:16px; background:linear-gradient(rgba(168,121,74,0.55),rgba(168,121,74,0.55)) 0 center/100% 1px no-repeat, repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(168,121,74,0.3) 0 1px, transparent 1px 10%) 0 center/100% 7px no-repeat; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance:none; -webkit-appearance:none; width:9px; height:16px; background:#FF4D1C; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.55); border-radius:1px; }

components.name: Number Input
components.description: Recessed bench well, mono tabular numerals.
components.css: .ds-input-number { width:100px; padding:6px 10px; background:#191714; border:1px solid rgba(168,121,74,0.3); border-radius:2px; color:#ECE7DE; font:400 12px ui-monospace,'SF Mono',Menlo,monospace; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; outline:none; transition:border-color 150ms; } .ds-input-number:focus { border-color:rgba(255,77,28,0.55); }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Stamped accordion row with sepia chevron.
components.css: .ds-section-head { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:11px 14px 10px; font:600 10px -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.2px; color:#ADA598; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(168,121,74,0.3); cursor:pointer; user-select:none; background:#24211B; } .ds-section-head:hover { color:#ECE7DE; } .ds-chev { font-size:9px; color:#A8794A; }

components.name: Status LED
components.css: .ds-led { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#3A342B; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display:inline-block; } .ds-led-working { background:#FF4D1C; animation:ds-blink 0.9s steps(2,jump-none) infinite; } .ds-led-ok { background:#3FB950; } @keyframes ds-blink { 0% { opacity:1; } 100% { opacity:0.25; } }

narrative.overview: A Teenage Engineering instrument faceplate bolted to an evening workbench, framing a USGS quad sheet. Every surface is solid, opaque, matte — warm charcoal with warm-white silk-screen ink, sepia contour rules for structure, one loud Signal Orange for action. Controls snap, switches rock, sliders run on ruler ticks, and a header LED signals idle/working/done/fault. The glass era is over.
keyCharacteristics: Solid faceplate docked flush-left; map framed by a sepia neatline with corner ticks
Selection coordinates printed as map marginalia, quad-sheet style
Four ink roles: orange = action, hydro = water, sepia = structure, green = success
Mechanical motion: 100–150ms snaps, out-expo, LED state signaling
2px radii, warm charcoal surfaces, mono tabular numerals everywhere

rules.name: The One Orange Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange is action and only action. If it isn't a control the user fires or a state the machine is in, it isn't orange.

rules.name: The Ink Roles Rule
rules.body: Four roles, one job each: orange acts, hydro is water, sepia structures, green succeeds. A color used outside its role is a defect.

rules.name: The Solid Surface Rule
rules.body: No translucent chrome, no backdrop blur, no alpha surfaces. Depth comes from surface steps and sepia rules.

rules.name: The Mono Numerals Rule
rules.body: Any value a user might compare or re-read renders in the data font with tabular numerals — including coordinates printed on the map.

rules.name: The Bench Step Rule
rules.body: To lift a surface, step its charcoal one level lighter and rule its edge in sepia. Never add blur; never add a shadow.

dos: Do keep every chrome surface solid and matte; depth is a surface step + sepia rule.
Do reserve orange for action and hydro ink for water contexts only.
Do snap: 100–150ms, out-expo, press-down feedback; LED carries long-running state.
Do keep numerals mono-tabular everywhere, including map marginalia.
Do frame the map cartographically — neatline and marginalia are identity.
donts: Don't reintroduce translucency, backdrop blur, or alpha surfaces — the former glass system is an anti-reference now.
Don't ship the vibe-coded AI aesthetic: big radii, glows, gradient text, pill buttons, cream backgrounds.
Don't add anything toy-like or gamified: cartoon markers, confetti, badges.
Don't use orange decoratively, sepia for body text, or radii above 2px (the LED excepted).
Don't ease bouncily or animate longer than 150ms for state feedback.
